professionalExperience.description: Developed and supported multiple AI-driven products, including a conversational chatbot that uses retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and dynamically routes questions to the most appropriate LLM based on query type. Integrated and evaluated multiple AI APIs, improving response accuracy by 35%. Built and optimized backend pipelines using PostgreSQL, Supabase, and GCP to support document ingestion, storage, and retrieval. Improved system performance and user experience through iterative pipeline and UX optimizations, increasing engagement by 40%.
Built a responsive club portal, increasing engagement by 50% and automating 70% of manual work. Implemented real-time backend logic, enhancing reliability for 100+ users.

technicalProjects.description: Developed a multi-platform tool that audits applications for HIPAA compliance and generates detailed AI-powered reports. Implemented secure authentication, real-time syncing, and weighted scoring to enhance audit reliability by 40%.
